rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND THROUGH VS. CARL ERNST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Compel Ccsf By And Through Its Port Commission To Pay The Judgment Moving Party: Carl Ernst,Jr.
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 9, 2011, line 1. Carl Ernest, Jr.'s Petition for Writ of Mandate to Compel CCSF by and through it's Port Commission to pay the Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES GAUSE VS. SUSAN ALTAWAL ALSO KNOWN AS SUSAN JOYCE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Satisfaction Of Judgmnt
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 9, 2011, line 2. Plaintiff James Gause' motion to compel satisfaction fo judgment. Off calendar. Transferred to Judge Karnow. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. AYMAN T. SHEHADEH et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 9, 2011, line 4. Defendant Anna Eubank Wyatt's demurrer to complaint. Overruled. 5 days to answer. Allegation in paragraph 5 sufficient re cause of action. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIDA, LLC et al VS. RICHARD KIM et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 9, 2011, line 5. Defendant Richard Kim's Motion to Strike complaint. Grant motion to strike paragraph 17e "forfeiture of agreement" not proper in temporary possession. Defense counsel ordered to comply with local Rule 2.65 in future. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIDA, LLC et al VS. RICHARD KIM et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 9, 2011, line 5. Defendant Richard Kim's demurrer to complaint. Overruled demurrer 5 days to answer. (501/REQ)
